title: Count distinct giving wrong results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INT, col1 FLOAT, col2 VARCHAR(10), col3 BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO tab1 VALUES (10, 20.5, 'test1', TRUE), (30, NULL, 'test2', FALSE), (50, 15.0, NULL, TRUE);
CREATE TABLE tab2(colA INT PRIMARY KEY, colB INT NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT col1 + 10) AS distinct_count FROM tab1 WHERE col3 = TRUE;
key_bug_features: COUNT DISTINCT with arithmetic operation on constant
